issues.description: Text states 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts for the duration of the current turn only. Should use duration:'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. The distinction matters: 'during this turn' is temporary and active only while the turn progresses, not persisting until end of turn.
Text says 'up to 1' which should be represented. Target scope is correct but optional selection (up to 1) could be more explicitly defined if the DSL supports quantity constraints.
